chapter_voice_summary: BG 2.3's engineering layer matches the chapter thesis voice. The line 'this is a small weakness of heart, drop it and stand up. Write the migration. Do it this week. Bring me the failing tests Friday if there are any' is precisely the senior-engineer-stops-explaining-gently voice the chapter thesis demands. Not cruel — clear. The voice is corrective, slightly stern, and decisive. The falsifiability and counter_example soften neither the corrective register nor the imperative — they restrict its application (no junior engineers, no override of real technical objections). 2.2 was the diagnosis voice; 2.3 is the imperative voice; both are within the chapter's didactic register. PASS.
